findings.title: Analogical fit posture
findings.detail: This case includes 2 analogical mappings and 3 direct mappings, so the authority fit should be presented as mixed direct and analogical support.

findings.title: Analogical fit posture
findings.detail: This case includes 2 analogical mappings and 3 direct mappings, so the authority fit should be presented as mixed direct and analogical support.

findings.title: Record-support-heavy fit posture
findings.detail: This case includes 3 record-support mappings, 1 analogical mappings, and 1 direct mappings, so downstream readers should distinguish record support from directly controlling authority.

findings.title: Analogical fit posture
findings.detail: This case includes 2 analogical mappings and 3 direct mappings, so the authority fit should be presented as mixed direct and analogical support.
